steps.title: Read the context
steps.content: The father is at the station 'trying to find me among some other people' after the narrator's eleven-year absence. He's searching to spot the narrator in the crowd — a physical search, not a discovery of meaning.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Locate captures finding someone by sight in a crowd. 'Reveal,' 'persuade,' and 'embarrass' don't fit looking for a person.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
